calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq., for Plaintiff Wing Li also present.
No appearance by the Defendants Sephr Zabih and Victoria Bayatmakoo.
09:50 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Wing Li was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at: 1842 40th Ave., San Francisco.
Backrent $4,600.00 and Per Diem Damages of $1,456.54 for the total of $6,056.54.
Attorney's Fees and Costs per noticed motion.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
